# discord_channel_permission (Resource)

Manages a single permission overwrite on a Discord channel for one role or member.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Set a permission overwrite on a channel using named permission keys.
data "discord_permission" "muted" {
  deny = ["send_messages", "add_reactions", "speak"]
}

resource "discord_channel_permission" "muted_role" {
  channel_id   = "456789012345678901"
  overwrite_id = "234567890123456789" # role or member snowflake
  type         = "role"
  allow        = data.discord_permission.muted.allow_bits
  deny         = data.discord_permission.muted.deny_bits
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the channel.
- `overwrite_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the target role or member.
- `type` (String) Overwrite target type: `role` or `member`.

### Optional

- `allow` (String) Allowed permission bitfield as a decimal string. See the `discord_permission` data source.
- `deny` (String) Denied permission bitfield as a decimal string. See the `discord_permission` data source.
